news.title:
CCL Products (India) Ltd saw a Rs. 21.9 crore NSE block trade for ~209,734 shares.
Shares traded at Rs. 1045.6 per share during the block transaction.
news.summary:
CCL Products (India) Ltd saw a Rs. 21.9 crore NSE block trade for ~209,734 shares.
Shares traded at Rs. 1045.6 per share during the block transaction.

news.title:
CCL Products clarifies volume rise is market-driven and not influenced by management.
Financial results disclosure may impact trading; company ensures regulatory compliance.
news.summary:
CCL Products clarifies volume rise is market-driven and not influenced by management.
Financial results disclosure may impact trading; company ensures regulatory compliance.

news.title:
India's coffee exports surged 22% in 2025, hitting $2.06B, driven by global demand and higher prices despite lower volumes.
Key stocks: Tata Consumer Products saw a 15% YoY revenue growth, while CCL Products grew revenue by 38% YoY in Q3FY26.
news.summary:
India's coffee exports surged 22% in 2025, hitting $2.06B, driven by global demand and higher prices despite lower volumes.
Key stocks: Tata Consumer Products saw a 15% YoY revenue growth, while CCL Products grew revenue by 38% YoY in Q3FY26.

news.title:
CCL Products has uploaded the Q3 FY25-26 results conference call audio on its website.
The audio recording link was shared for investor reference as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
CCL Products has uploaded the Q3 FY25-26 results conference call audio on its website.
The audio recording link was shared for investor reference as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
CCL Products (India) declares interim dividend of ₹2.75/share.
The move aims to reward shareholders of the company.
news.summary:
CCL Products (India) declares interim dividend of ₹2.75/share.
The move aims to reward shareholders of the company.

news.title:
CCL Products reports Q3 net profit of ₹1B, up from ₹630M YoY.
Revenue grows to ₹10.5B in Q3, compared to ₹7.5B YoY.
news.summary:
CCL Products reports Q3 net profit of ₹1B, up from ₹630M YoY.
Revenue grows to ₹10.5B in Q3, compared to ₹7.5B YoY.

news.title:
CCL Products (India) Ltd schedules a conference call on 5th Feb 2026 to discuss 3QFY26 results.
Key management, including MD and CFO, will participate; details shared with dial-in options.
news.summary:
CCL Products (India) Ltd schedules a conference call on 5th Feb 2026 to discuss 3QFY26 results.
Key management, including MD and CFO, will participate; details shared with dial-in options.

news.title:
FMCG sector urges Budget measures to boost consumption and rural development.
Govt's focus on infra, manufacturing, and GST 2.0 fosters business stability.
news.summary:
FMCG sector urges Budget measures to boost consumption and rural development.
Govt's focus on infra, manufacturing, and GST 2.0 fosters business stability.

news.title:
CCL Products' board approves ₹2B guarantee to JP Morgan for Continental Coffee SA.
The guarantee supports Continental Coffee SA's operations in Switzerland.
news.summary:
CCL Products' board approves ₹2B guarantee to JP Morgan for Continental Coffee SA.
The guarantee supports Continental Coffee SA's operations in Switzerland.

news.title:
Union Budget 2026 sees industries like real estate, insurance, FMCG, and telecom pushing for tax relief, infrastructure support, and policy stability to boost growth.
Companies like Universal Sompo, CCL Products, ICRA, Chalet Hotels, and DSS Imagetech emphasize GST rationalization, housing incentives, and infrastructure-led growth.
news.summary:
Union Budget 2026 sees industries like real estate, insurance, FMCG, and telecom pushing for tax relief, infrastructure support, and policy stability to boost growth.
Companies like Universal Sompo, CCL Products, ICRA, Chalet Hotels, and DSS Imagetech emphasize GST rationalization, housing incentives, and infrastructure-led growth.

news.title:
CCL Products India's share price surged 268% over five years, outpacing its 14% annual EPS growth.
Total Shareholder Return (TSR) for five years was 282%, boosted by dividends, outperforming share price returns.
news.summary:
CCL Products India's share price surged 268% over five years, outpacing its 14% annual EPS growth.
Total Shareholder Return (TSR) for five years was 282%, boosted by dividends, outperforming share price returns.

news.title:
CCL Products revises FY26 EBITDA growth outlook to 20%, up from 15-20% guidance.
Domestic sales projected at Rs. 650 crore, branded sales Rs. 430-450 crore, aiming Rs. 1000 crore by FY27.
news.summary:
CCL Products revises FY26 EBITDA growth outlook to 20%, up from 15-20% guidance.
Domestic sales projected at Rs. 650 crore, branded sales Rs. 430-450 crore, aiming Rs. 1000 crore by FY27.

news.title: CCL Products anticipates coffee price correction due to higher output from Brazil, Vietnam.
news.summary: CCL Products anticipates coffee price correction due to higher output from Brazil, Vietnam.

news.title:
CCL Products appoints Srinivas Atla as Chief HR Officer, effective Nov 13, 2025.
Atla brings 28 years of HR experience, including roles at Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd.
news.summary:
CCL Products appoints Srinivas Atla as Chief HR Officer, effective Nov 13, 2025.

news.title:
CCL Products India guides volume growth of 10-20% for coming period.
Estimated first-half growth currently stands at 15%.
news.summary:
CCL Products India guides volume growth of 10-20% for coming period.

news.title:
CCL Products reports Q2 PAT growth of 36.4%, driven by coffee demand surge.
Company sets a 20% growth target amid strong market conditions.
news.summary:

news.title: CCL Products surged nearly 12% after reporting strong Q2 results.
news.summary: CCL Products surged nearly 12% after reporting strong Q2 results.

news.title:
CCL Products India Q2 EBITDA rose to ₹1.97B from ₹1.37B YoY.
Q2 EBITDA margin declined to 17.5% from 18.57% YoY.
news.summary:

news.title:
CCL Products to acquire 26% stake in renewable power firm for Rs 12.1 crore.
The investment ensures access to 10 MW of wind and solar power, cutting energy costs.
news.summary:
CCL Products to acquire 26% stake in renewable power firm for Rs 12.1 crore.

Q2 results on Nov 5 for Britannia, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Grasim, Ramco Cements, and more.
Live updates include results for Tube Investments, Astral, Blue Star, BEML, and Honeywell Automation.
